svg.text: Now... try walking into the wall to your right (using the 'd' key). Notice how our player just magically jumps right up to the top? So why is that? Well, the first thing to realise about a wall is that it is really just a very very steep slope! Our player has no limit on how high he can rise up a slope if he's touching it, so he just pings up to the top! Our next step is to create a limit...
